principal_verdict: FAIL — CAUSAL READOUT DID NOT GENERALIZE
one_line: A minimal dynamic-range writing correction (C1c, same Psi, two timescales) raised STORAGE to two prospectively-decodable coordinates in a viable droplet, but the second (order) coordinate is stored spatially and is NOT causally expressed: it collapses under mean-transplant (-0.04) and is sub-threshold in-place (0.30<0.50); causal-response stays ~1-D.
hypothesis_outcome: H1 (dynamic-range) SUPPORTED for STORAGE; the failure is at causal READOUT/observability, not writing-map storage.
selected_mechanism: C1c: eta_w 0.05->0.015, eta_d1 0.03->0.35 (fast forgetting), eta_d2 0.003->0.006, k_exp 2.0->1.0 (de-saturate Psi). Same single write signal Psi; two existing components; readouts unchanged.

gates.G5_fresh_prospective_sealed: PASS (SHA-256 c6d0cd3c..., before selection; dev/prospective seeds disjoint)
gates.G7_C0_baseline_replicated: PASS (rank-1: dev min 0.19, sigma2/1 0.022; prospective h1 0.42/h2 0.49, sigma2/1 0.036)
gates.G8_C1_dynamic_range: PASS-STORAGE / FAIL-CAUSAL (C1c dev 0.84; prospective storage h1 0.94/h2 0.94; but causal h2 fails)
gates.G9_C2_authorized_if_justified: NOT AUTHORIZED (C1 qualified storage; minimality). C2a tested for completeness: dev 0.79, not selected
gates.G10_candidate_minimality: PASS (selected C1, the smaller claim: two timescales of one signal)
gates.G11_inputs_independently_realized: PASS (design corr(h1,h2) -0.08 dev / -0.26 prosp; both realized in memory)
gates.G17_incremental_independence: PASS-WITH-CAVEAT (orthogonal targets both decoded; sigma2/1 0.283 marginally < preregistered 0.30)
gates.G18_two_causal_response_axes: FAIL (h1 causal 0.61 transplant / 0.50 in-place; h2 causal -0.04 transplant / 0.30 in-place <0.50; response effdim ~1.0-1.1)
gates.G19_erase_transplant_controls: PARTIAL (erase shifts response; memory-inert both0 collapses to ~0 => causal necessity for h1; h2 not transplant-expressed)
gates.G20_channel_specific_ablations: PARTIAL (both0 collapses; lp0/lm0 do not separate h1 vs h2 because causal response is ~1-D)
gates.G21_material_turnover_preserved: NOT RE-RUN (inherited MCM M~0.12; Phase C did not re-measure turnover)
gates.G22_viability_preserved: PASS (localized size ~31-36 all candidates; no delocalization)
gates.G23_capacity_viability_classified: PASS -> CV-A for STORAGE (2-D storage while viable); causal-response remains 1-D due to READOUT OBSERVABILITY, not a viability tradeoff
gates.G24_no_tag_tracker_leakage: PASS (only physical nutrient drive; no labels/ids)

key_numbers.backward_compat_check: C2 split-engine single-mode == frozen MCM, max|dev|=0.00e0/150 steps

decisions.reproduction_readiness: REPRODUCTION NOT READY (causal 2-D not achieved; second coordinate not transplant-expressed)
decisions.genome_relevance: GENOME NOT REQUIRED (a failed causal readout does not justify a genome)
decisions.sealed_assets: HMC PROSPECTIVE SPLIT sealed; SC-PILOT-CAUSAL-FINGERPRINT blocked; EXP-SC-01 blocked — untouched

next_experiment: Not a writing change: the storage is already 2-D. The gap is READOUT. Preregister a spatial/structured causal readout (e.g., full-field memory transplant preserving spatial pattern, or a polarization-sensitive probe) to test whether the spatially-stored order coordinate can be causally expressed and transplanted. Only if that fails should a distinct-signal write (C2) or a second readout be revisited.
